title: scaevola humilis
intro: Scaevola humilis, also known as the fan flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia that produces delicate, fan-shaped flowers in shades of blue, purple, and white. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Scaevola humilis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Scaevola humilis include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
